title: Conductive Players
description: Smite certain players whenever they join
body:
This is a serverside mod that will smite the mod author and any other players included in the conductive_players.config file whenever they join.

The lightning is cosmetic, it does no damage and does not set blocks on fire.

Icon modified from [Lorc](https://lorcblog.blogspot.com/), licenced under CC-BY 3.0
